input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.4.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.4.4.2
            TITLE: submit the vehicle drawings as given in section dr - document requirements

            CONTENT:
            rule S.4.4.2: Submit the Vehicle Drawings as given in section DR - Document Requirements
S.4.4.2 Submit the Vehicle Drawings as given in section DR - Document Requirements

final_answer: rule S.4.4.2: Submit the Vehicle Drawings as given in section DR - Document Requirements
